title: UCDP active conflict presence
description: Forecast whether an active UCDP conflict involving the target country will exist during a post-as_of observation window.
question_template: As of {as_of_year}, will {target} have at least one active UCDP conflict recorded between {as_of_year}-01-01 and {resolution_year}-12-31?
limitations: Evidence and resolution use UCDP conflict events with event_date <= as_of_date for retrieval and holdout events in the resolution window for scoring. Event typing in processed data is coarse; resolution builder must map UCDP rows consistently (Phase 2).
